name: Slardar
description: I guard what slumbers in the deeps.

abilities.name: Seaborn Sentinel
abilities.description: Grants Slardar bonus health regeneration, bonus armor, bonus attack damage, and bonus movement speed in certain water-based terrains. Increases both the bonus health regeneration and the bonus armor granted. Health Regen Bonus: 2.5/5/7.5/10 (24.5/27/29.5/32). Armor Bonus: 3/4/5/6 (13/14/15/16). Attack Damage Bonus: 8/16/24/32 (38/46/54/62). Move Speed Bonus: 18%. Bonus Linger Duration: 0.033. Status Resist Bonus: (40%).

abilities.name: Guardian Sprint
abilities.description: Move Speed Bonus: 10%/18%/26%/34%. Duration: 10 (12). Cooldown: 29/25/21/17. Mana Cost: 25.

abilities.name: Slithereen Crush
abilities.description: Stuns and damages nearby enemy land units. After the stun, the affected units are slowed. Creates a water-based terrain that grant bonuses to certain abilities of Slardar's. Effect Radius: 325. Damage: 75/150/225/300 (200/275/350/425). Move Speed Slow: 20%/25%/30%/35%. Attack Speed Slow: 20/25/30/35. Slow Duration: 3/4/5/6. Stun Duration: 0.8. Mana Cost: 7.

abilities.name: Bash of the Deep
abilities.description: Attack Damage / Physical Required Attacks: 4. Damage: 35/90/145/200 (38/93/148/203). Duration: 1.

abilities.name: Corrosive Haze
abilities.description: Reduces the affected enemy target's armor, provides True Sight and vision over it, revealing invisibility. Cast Range: 900. Armor Reduction: 10/15/20 (26/31/36). Duration: 18. Puddle Radius: 100 (180). Puddle per Interval: 1. Puddle Duration: 7 (12). Mana Cost: 5.
